item.name: Accordion
item.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Accordion primitive preserving model-owned value state, single and multiple selection, disabled item behavior, Enter and Space keyboard activation, deprecated orientation data attributes, ARIA relationships, panel mounting policy, and root/item/header/trigger/panel data attributes.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema, Option, and predicate helpers for serializable options and activation payloads.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React Accordion primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
Origin Base UI React Accordion primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Open item value state is a model-owned input and trigger presses emit value-change facts instead of mutating internal component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit preserves unidirectional data flow. Consumers update their model in response to AccordionValueChange payloads.

deviations.summary: Transition status and panel dimensions are explicit inputs rather than DOM-measured internal state.
deviations.rationale: Base UI measures panel dimensions for animated panels. Foldkit registry primitives stay pure and reuse the plan 028 explicit measurement convention.

deviations.summary: The deprecated loopFocus option is accepted as source-evidence API shape but intentionally has no keyboard behavior.
deviations.rationale: Pinned Base UI Accordion deprecates loopFocus and orientation-driven roving focus after the APG update. The Foldkit helper preserves orientation data attributes but does not implement arrow-key focus movement.

item.name: Avatar
item.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Avatar primitive preserving root, image, fallback, modeled image loading state, status data attributes, native image props, and image load/error message hooks.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema for Avatar options, image loading status, transition status, fallback delay state, and parts.

development.reason: Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native and caller-owned state drives image loading.

examples.title: AvatarHero
examples.description: Base UI Avatar hero fixture with image, fallback, and text fallback avatar.

deviations.summary: Image loading is caller-owned Foldkit model state instead of an internal React Image effect.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit installable source must remain pure and unidirectional. The helper exposes image load/error message hooks and derives rendered parts from the caller's modeled ImageLoadingStatus.

deviations.summary: Fallback delay visibility is represented by explicit delayStatus state instead of an internal timer.
deviations.rationale: Timers belong in Foldkit commands or subscriptions owned by an app model. The installable helper preserves fallback visibility semantics without hidden lifecycle state.

item.name: Button
item.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Button primitive preserving native disabled, focusable disabled, non-native role, and keyboard activation semantics.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema and Option for the serializable options and event mapping.

development.reason: Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.

item.name: Checkbox
item.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Checkbox primitive preserving controlled checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states, root and indicator data attributes, disabled/read-only/required/invalid states, Space keyboard activation, and native checkbox form controls without internal state.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema, Option, and predicate helpers for serializable options and activation payloads.

development.reason: Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.

deviations.summary: Indeterminate state is represented through ARIA and data attributes rather than mutating the native input indeterminate property.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit installable source is declarative and stateless. The rendered root exposes aria-checked="mixed" and data-indeterminate, which preserves the public accessible state without DOM mutation.

item.name: Collapsible
item.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Collapsible primitive preserving model-owned open state, trigger activation, ARIA expanded and controls relationships, root/trigger/panel state data attributes, disabled trigger behavior, and panel mounting policy.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema, Option, and predicate helpers for serializable options and activation payloads.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React Collapsible primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
Origin Base UI React Collapsible primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Open state is a model-owned input and trigger presses emit open-change facts instead of mutating internal component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit preserves unidirectional data flow. Consumers update their model in response to CollapsibleOpenChange payloads.

deviations.summary: ARIA controls relationships use caller-provided ids instead of generated React ids.
deviations.rationale: Installable render helpers are pure and deterministic. Consumers provide stable root or panel ids when they need aria-controls wiring.

deviations.summary: Transition status and panel dimensions are explicit inputs rather than DOM-measured internal state.
deviations.rationale: Base UI measures scroll dimensions for animated panels. Foldkit registry primitives stay pure; shared animation measurement belongs in a future runtime policy or consumer command.

item.name: Dialog
item.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Dialog primitive preserving model-owned open state, trigger/open/close facts, native dialog ARIA relationships, modal command helpers, backdrop and popup state data attributes, and title/description wiring.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, Command, Dom, and message helpers for the Foldkit-native primitive.
Provides Effect Schema, Option, Predicate, and Effect composition for serializable options and command helpers.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React Dialog primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
Origin Base UI React Dialog primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Open state is a model-owned input and user interactions emit open-change facts instead of mutating internal component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit preserves unidirectional data flow. Consumers update their model and return command helpers in response to DialogOpenChange payloads.

deviations.summary: Focus trap, Escape routing, scroll lock, and focus restoration are exposed as explicit Command helpers rather than hidden inside render helpers.
deviations.rationale: Dialog side effects must stay at Foldkit's Command boundary. The installable view remains pure and deterministic.

deviations.summary: Non-modal state renders ARIA and open attributes without installing modal focus trapping or scroll locking commands.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit's current Dom.showModal helper intentionally traps focus. Non-modal behavior is represented without pretending modal side effects are absent.

item.name: Fieldset
item.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Fieldset primitive preserving native fieldset disabled behavior, explicit legend association, parent-disabled propagation, and root/legend data attributes without hidden runtime state.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema and predicate helpers for serializable options and explicit disabled/legend state.

development.reason: Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.
Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: FieldsetOriginFixture
examples.description: Static origin-evidence fixture derived from deterministic Base UI Fieldset Root and Legend output.

examples.title: FieldsetFoldkitFixture
examples.description: Foldkit parity fixture exercising root, legend, disabled, and explicit legend id behavior.

deviations.summary: Legend association uses an explicit or root-derived legendId option instead of React context registration.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit render helpers are stateless and do not use hidden mutable context. Root aria-labelledby and legend id are derived from config or supplied by the consumer.

deviations.summary: Only Root and Legend parts are implemented; description, error, invalid, and required Fieldset parts or states are omitted.
deviations.rationale: The pinned Base UI Fieldset source and docs expose Root and Legend only, with disabled as the only Fieldset state. Additional form field states belong to later Field/Form primitives.

deviations.summary: Parity origin fixture uses static source-derived markup for deterministic Root and Legend output.
deviations.rationale: Root and Legend render deterministic markup, and this matches the existing static-fixture pattern for behavior primitives while pinned origin source remains available in repos/base-ui.

item.name: Input
item.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Input primitive preserving native form attributes, controlled value changes, and Field control data attributes without internal state.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema and predicate helpers for serializable options and event payloads.

development.reason: Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.

item.name: Meter
item.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Meter primitive preserving root, label, track, indicator, value, ARIA, value clamping, range normalization, and formatting semantics.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema for the serializable Meter options, parts, and format values.

development.reason: Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.

deviations.summary: Meter label association uses an explicit labelId option instead of React-managed context.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit render helpers are stateless and do not use hidden mutable context; callers provide a stable labelId so root aria-labelledby and label id remain explicit and deterministic.

deviations.summary: Meter composition uses a Foldkit toView callback instead of Base UI's React render prop.
deviations.rationale: The registry item exposes Foldkit Html attributes for each named part and lets callers compose them through toView, preserving the part contract without React render/asChild interop.

item.name: Popover
item.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Popover primitive preserving model-owned open state, trigger/open/close facts, deterministic modal and placement attributes, popup ARIA relationships, command-facing focus and scroll-lock helpers, backdrop, arrow, and title/description wiring.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, Command, Dom, and message helpers for the Foldkit-native primitive.
Provides Effect Schema, Option, Predicate, and Effect composition for serializable options and command helpers.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React Popover primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
Origin Base UI React Popover primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Open state is a model-owned input and user interactions emit open-change facts instead of mutating internal component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit preserves unidirectional data flow. Consumers update their model and return command helpers in response to PopoverOpenChange payloads.

deviations.summary: Focus handoff and focus restoration are exposed as explicit Command helpers rather than hidden inside render helpers.
deviations.rationale: Popover side effects must stay at Foldkit's Command boundary. The installable view remains pure and deterministic.

deviations.summary: Placement is represented through deterministic side, align, offset, collision, positioner, and arrow attributes without performing DOM measurement or collision flipping.
deviations.rationale: Real collision handling depends on measured geometry and should be added through a shared measurement service, not an ad hoc render helper side effect.

deviations.summary: The modal surface is exposed with data and ARIA attributes, and modal=true locks scroll through commands, but pointer isolation and non-dialog trap-focus are not fully implemented.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit currently provides scroll lock, focus, and dialog-specific modal helpers, but this registry item does not have a shared non-dialog focus-trap or pointer-isolation command primitive. The 'trap-focus' mode is therefore command-facing and explicit rather than hidden inside render helpers.

item.name: Progress
item.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Progress primitive preserving root, label, track, indicator, value, ARIA, state data attributes, value clamping, formatting, and indeterminate semantics.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema for the serializable Progress options, parts, and status values.

deviations.summary: Progress label association uses an explicit labelId option instead of React-managed context.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit render helpers are stateless and do not use hidden mutable context; callers provide a stable labelId so root aria-labelledby and label id remain explicit and deterministic.

deviations.summary: Arrow-key roving selection emits a focus selector payload instead of mutating focus internally.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit installable source is stateless and pure. The consuming update owns model changes and can run focus commands from the emitted selector without hidden component state.

deviations.summary: Radio root, indicator, and input semantics are exposed through the Radio Group item descriptors instead of a separate base-ui/radio registry item.
deviations.rationale: This implementation slice is scoped to base-ui/radio-group and shadcn/radio-group. Colocating item attributes preserves the public grouped radio behavior without introducing an out-of-scope registry item.

deviations.summary: Slider values are supplied by the consuming Foldkit model rather than stored in hidden component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit render helpers are stateless. Keyboard, input, and pointer handlers emit value-change facts so the application update function owns the canonical value.

deviations.summary: Pointer geometry is exposed as deterministic helpers that accept measured control rectangles.
deviations.rationale: The installable source avoids shared DOM measurement infrastructure. Consumers can measure in commands and feed the rect into the pure helper while parity fixtures can test geometry deterministically.

deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic strings preserve the default RTL rendered output while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.
